caption.full:
Elle Fanning and Julianne Moore to star in Margaret Wise Brown biopic

Elle Fanning and Julianne Moore are set to star in the new film Moonsong: A Life In Seven Verses, a biopic about children's author Margaret Wise Brown. Rebecca Miller will direct and write the script, with Martin Scorsese attached as an executive producer. Filming is scheduled to begin in Spring 2027.

Which of Margaret Wise Brown’s books do you hope gets the most focus in Moonsong: A Life In Seven Verses?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #MargaretWiseBrown #ElleFanning
caption.firstComment: I keep picturing the rhythm of ‘Goodnight Moon’ in their scenes together — which of her stories feels most essential to you in this film?
